reefton-spur.name: Caltex Warburton
reefton-spur.notes: Fill up here before departing. 3458 Warburton Highway, Warburton VIC 3799.

reefton-spur.name: Reefton Hotel
reefton-spur.notes: 1600 Woods Point Rd, McMahons Creek. Historic biker pub est. 1886. Cold beer, counter meals. Last stop before the Spur.

reefton-spur.name: Marysville General Store (fuel)
reefton-spur.notes: Basic fuel available at the end of the route in Marysville.

black-spur.name: BP Healesville
black-spur.notes: Fill up here before departing. 66 Maroondah Highway, Healesville VIC 3777.

black-spur.name: Healesville Hotel
black-spur.notes: 256 Maroondah Hwy. Restored 1910 gastropub with great local wines and beer. Fill up on coffee and brunch before the Spur.

black-spur.name: Black Spur Inn
black-spur.notes: Country pub mid-Spur. Log fire in winter, packed with riders in summer.

black-spur.name: Shell Healesville
black-spur.notes: Full service fuel station in Healesville. Fill up before the Spur.

donna-buang.name: Caltex Warburton
donna-buang.notes: Fill up here before departing. 3458 Warburton Hwy. Last fuel before the summit climb.

donna-buang.name: Mt Donna Buang Summit Rest Area
donna-buang.notes: Public toilets, grassy area, and 21m viewing tower at summit. No food or fuel.

great-ocean-road-torquay.name: United Torquay
great-ocean-road-torquay.notes: Fill up here before departing. Surf Coast Highway, Torquay VIC 3228.

great-ocean-road-torquay.name: BP Anglesea
great-ocean-road-torquay.notes: Fuel stop early in the ride.

great-ocean-road-torquay.name: Aireys Inlet — Split Point Lighthouse
great-ocean-road-torquay.notes: Quick photo stop at the iconic lighthouse. Short detour off the GOR.

great-ocean-road-torquay.name: Shell Lorne
great-ocean-road-torquay.notes: 74 Mountjoy Parade, Lorne. Mid-route fuel. Note: 95RON not available on GOR, only 91 & 98 RON.

great-ocean-road-torquay.name: Teddy's Lookout — Lorne
great-ocean-road-torquay.notes: Panoramic views of the coastline. Short ride up from Lorne.

great-ocean-road-torquay.name: BP Apollo Bay
great-ocean-road-torquay.notes: End of route fuel. Fill up before return trip.

lorne-deans-marsh.name: Shell Lorne
lorne-deans-marsh.notes: Fill up here before departing. 74 Mountjoy Parade. Fuel up before heading inland. No fuel on the route.

lorne-deans-marsh.name: Teddy's Lookout
lorne-deans-marsh.notes: Panoramic coastal views. Quick stop before climbing inland.

skenes-creek-otways.name: BP Apollo Bay
skenes-creek-otways.notes: Fill up here before departing. Fuel up in Apollo Bay before the climb. No fuel on the route to Forrest.

kinglake-loop.name: BP Hurstbridge
kinglake-loop.notes: Fill up here before departing. Heidelberg-Kinglake Rd, Hurstbridge VIC 3099.

kinglake-loop.name: St Andrews Hotel
kinglake-loop.notes: Classic biker pub with live bands on weekends. Great pub grub and cold beer. On the loop route.

kinglake-loop.name: Shell Whittlesea
kinglake-loop.notes: Fuel up before or after the loop.

dandenong-ranges.name: 7-Eleven Bayswater
dandenong-ranges.notes: Fill up here before departing. 936 Mountain Highway, Bayswater VIC 3153.

dandenong-ranges.name: BP Bayswater
dandenong-ranges.notes: Full service fuel station at the start. No fuel stations in the Dandenong Ranges villages.

dandenong-ranges.name: SkyHigh Mount Dandenong
dandenong-ranges.notes: Motorcycle parking $3. Coffee kiosk open from 10.15am. Public toilets available.

mornington-loop.name: Shell Frankston
mornington-loop.notes: Fill up here before departing. Nepean Highway, Frankston VIC 3199.

mornington-loop.name: United Rosebud
mornington-loop.notes: Last fuel before peninsula tip and Cape Schanck.

mornington-loop.name: Arthurs Seat Lookout
mornington-loop.notes: Panoramic views of the Peninsula and Port Phillip Bay. Hairpin climb up is popular with riders.

yarra-valley-loop.name: Shell Lilydale
yarra-valley-loop.notes: Fill up here before departing. Maroondah Highway, Lilydale VIC 3140.

yarra-valley-loop.name: Shell Healesville
yarra-valley-loop.notes: Fill up here for the Black Spur. Essential mid-route fuel.

yarra-valley-loop.name: Marysville General Store (fuel)
yarra-valley-loop.notes: Basic fuel. Top up before heading to Warburton.

yarra-valley-loop.name: BP Warburton
yarra-valley-loop.notes: Fuel available at the end of the loop.

yarra-valley-loop.name: Buxton Hotel
yarra-valley-loop.notes: Popular mid-point feed stop. Race bike on the roof. Counter meals.

yarra-glen-loop.name: Shell Lilydale
yarra-glen-loop.notes: Fill up here before departing. Maroondah Highway, Lilydale VIC 3140.

yarra-glen-loop.name: Shell Healesville
yarra-glen-loop.notes: Full service fuel station at the end of the loop.

yarra-glen-loop.name: Yarra Valley Chocolaterie
yarra-glen-loop.notes: Free chocolate tastings. On a back road between Yarra Glen and Healesville.

mt-baw-baw.name: BP Warragul
mt-baw-baw.notes: Fill up here before departing. FILL UP — no fuel between Warragul and the summit. Closest fuel towns are 60km from the resort.

mt-baw-baw.name: United Noojee
mt-baw-baw.notes: Last fuel before alpine section. Check availability — small town fuel stop.

mt-baw-baw.name: Noojee Hotel
mt-baw-baw.notes: Country pub. Wood-fired pizza, beer, toilets. Last decent food before the climb.

lerderderg-gorge.name: Shell Bacchus Marsh
lerderderg-gorge.notes: Fill up here before departing. Main Street, Bacchus Marsh VIC 3340. No fuel between Bacchus Marsh and Daylesford.

lerderderg-gorge.name: BP Daylesford
lerderderg-gorge.notes: Fuel at the end of the route in Daylesford.

lerderderg-gorge.name: Lerderderg Gorge Lookout
lerderderg-gorge.notes: Quick stop for gorge views and leg stretch. Short walk from road.

blackwood-trentham-loop.name: Shell Bacchus Marsh
blackwood-trentham-loop.notes: Fill up here before departing. Main Street, Bacchus Marsh VIC 3340. No fuel between Bacchus Marsh and Daylesford.

blackwood-trentham-loop.name: Blackwood Hotel
blackwood-trentham-loop.notes: 22 Martin St. Historic country pub. Counter meals, cold beer, toilets. Mid-ride stop.

blackwood-trentham-loop.name: RedBeard Historic Bakery
blackwood-trentham-loop.notes: 38A High St, Trentham. World-class sourdough bakery. Coffee and baked goods.

great-alpine-road.name: Great Alpine Road Fuel Stop (Bright)
great-alpine-road.notes: Fill up here before departing. 1 Anderson Street, Bright VIC 3741.

great-alpine-road.name: BP Alpine Bright
great-alpine-road.notes: 76 Gavan St, Bright. FILL UP — no reliable fuel for 130km to Omeo. Last guaranteed fuel.

great-alpine-road.name: Zirky's Cafe — Mt Hotham
great-alpine-road.notes: 1 Great Alpine Rd, Hotham Heights. Open daily from 8am. Coffee, pastries, and hot meals at altitude.

great-alpine-road.name: Dinner Plain fuel (seasonal)
great-alpine-road.notes: Limited seasonal fuel. Do NOT rely on this — fill up in Bright.

great-alpine-road.name: Omeo Fuel
great-alpine-road.notes: End of route fuel. Fill up for the return trip.

great-alpine-road.name: Mt Hotham Alpine Resort First Aid

south-gippsland-cruise.name: BP Korumburra
south-gippsland-cruise.notes: Fill up here before departing. 2 Commercial Street, Korumburra VIC 3950.

south-gippsland-cruise.name: Loch Village Foodstore & Cafe
south-gippsland-cruise.notes: Netrider-recommended biker cafe. Egg & bacon focaccia, hot chocolate, clean toilets.

south-gippsland-cruise.name: United Fish Creek
south-gippsland-cruise.notes: Mid-route fuel stop in Fish Creek.

south-gippsland-cruise.name: Yanakie General Store & Fuel
south-gippsland-cruise.notes: LAST FUEL before Wilsons Promontory NP. No fuel anywhere in the park.

south-gippsland-cruise.name: Foster fuel
south-gippsland-cruise.notes: Alternative fuel stop if coming via Foster instead of direct to the Prom.
